title: OcxTrace
text: OcxTrace Specifies the OCX messages that are directed to the Transcript Window. OcxTrace = MessageCode Arguments Allowed values are integers representing the sum of message codes shown in the following table. Table 1. Codes for selecting OCX messages Code Description 0 No messages logged 1 Log error messages (default) 2 Log warning messages 4 Log information messages Default value 1 File section [ocx] Description For example, setting OcxTrace to 6 results in all warning and information messages being logged.
